content.full_text:
The Law Firm of

Knox, Lemmon & Brady
455 Capitol Mall, Suite 210
Sacramento, California 95814
(916) 448-9911
FAX (916) 448-2566

Louis J. Anspoisky
Matthew V. Brady
Thomas S. Knox
John M. Lemmon
Susan J. Sheridan

Peter D. Lemmon
Merguerte D. Shea
Robert T. DeMarco
Sheila M. Lamb

OF COUNSEL
Philip M. Knox, Jr.

March 4, 1992

Ms. Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J. Street
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Ms. Wardlow:

This letter confirms your conversation with Tom Knox today concerning a letter from your office to the Chairman of the California-Nevada Super Speed Ground Transportation Commission ("SST Commission") about the reporting responsibilities of its Commissioners to the Fair Political Practices Commission.

Tom Knox promised to provide you with a draft of the letter for your use and I enclose it here.

If you will call me once the letter has been signed, we will arrange to pick it up today and deliver it to the Chairman and other members of the SST Commission.

Thank you for your courtesy and cooperation.

Very truly yours,

PETER D. LEMMON

f:\slsst\wardlow.ltr

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Law Firm of Knox, Lemmon & Brady to Ms. Carla Wardlow, Division Chief of the Technical Assistance and Analysis Division at the Fair Political Practices Commission. The firm confirms a conversation with Tom Knox regarding a letter from the Fair Political Practices Commission to the Chairman of the California-Nevada Super Speed Ground Transportation Commission ("SST Commission") about the reporting responsibilities of its Commissioners to the Fair Political Practices Commission. Tom Knox promised to provide a draft of the letter for Ms. Wardlow's use, which is enclosed in the letter. If Ms. Wardlow calls once the letter has been signed, the firm will arrange to pick it up today and deliver it to the Chairman and other members of the SST Commission. Thank you for your courtesy and cooperation. Very truly yours, PETER D. LEMMON
